reviews.comment:
Exelente... Simplemente exelente lugar un taller como corresponde. Sin vueltas. Único detalle el día que lo deje estaban de obra y hoy fui por el auto y era increíble la cantidad de polvo que tenía mi auto. Ja yo se los di limpio pero bueno es un detalle nada más..

(Translated by Google)
Excellent... Simply an excellent place, a proper workshop. No fuss. The only issue was that they were doing construction the day I dropped it off, and when I went to pick up my car today, it was unbelievable how much dust it had on it. Haha, I gave it to them clean, but oh well, it's just a minor detail.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHdTczMW5RRRAB
